race.comment: LUDLUM (2) resumes with the best profile having last been seen starting $5 in a Listed race at Flemington during Cup week. He'd just missed on debut behind a good one before winning in slick time around here and now kicks off with a jumpout win under his belt. Tough draw but looks the one to beat. CHOWDOWN (1) is going well, following up a fresh win with two strong efforts behind some good 3yos. Is off a let-up here but brings a high standard and has strong claims. ROGUE WARRIOR (5) closed off nicely when beaten a neck into third last time at Sale first up and with more to come he should take holding out. ELECTRIC ELVIS (4) resumes. He was very consistent last time in under the G Begg yard and should be competitive again with Reece Goodwin. Wary of GLAM AWARD (10) for strong connections at her local debut.
